# SocQ

SocQ provides asynchronous public social-data APIs and AI-agent integrations.

## Primary documentation

- https://docs.socq.ai/
- https://docs.socq.ai/api-manual/agent-api/overview
- https://docs.socq.ai/integrations/overview
- https://docs.socq.ai/integrations/mcp
- https://docs.socq.ai/integrations/cli
- https://docs.socq.ai/integrations/skill

## Machine-readable interfaces

- Capability Registry: https://docs.socq.ai/capability-catalog.json
- OpenAPI: https://docs.socq.ai/api-manual/agent-api/agent-api.json
- JSON index: https://docs.socq.ai/llms.json
- Hosted MCP: https://api.socq.ai/mcp

Authentication uses `Authorization: Bearer SOCQ_API_KEY`. Collection endpoints return a task ID; poll the task endpoint until it succeeds or fails, then follow cursor pagination.
